description: Configurable parameters for Mountpoint for S3 CSI Driver

nodeSelector.description: nodeSelector for S3 CSI Driver Controller. See https://github.com/awslabs/mountpoint-s3-csi-driver/blob/main/docs/INSTALL.md#configuring-nodeselector-for-the-controller-component for more details.

resources.description: Resource requests and limits for the Mountpoint for S3 CSI Driver Controller container.

tolerations.title: Tolerations for Mountpoint for S3 CSI Driver Controller

defaultTolerations.description: Apply the chart's built-in default tolerations to Mountpoint for S3 CSI Driver Pods. Set to false to opt out and use only the entries supplied in `tolerations`. Has no effect when `tolerateAllTaints` is true.

kubeletPath.description: Host kubelet path of the node

nodeSelector.description: nodeSelector for S3 CSI Driver Node DaemonSet

enable.description: Deprecated with Mountpoint for S3 CSI Driver v2 and always enabled. Enable `podInfoOnMount` on the CSIDriver object, a pre-requisite for pod authentication sources on k8s<=1.30

tolerateAllTaints.description: Mountpoint for S3 CSI Driver Pods will tolerate all taints and will be scheduled in all nodes

tolerations.title: Tolerations for Mountpoint for S3 CSI Driver Pods
